dev.title: Dev Projects
dev.subtitle: A selection of things I've built.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: This very site — a bilingual static portfolio built with Nuxt 4, deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: Full-stack e-commerce app with product catalog, cart, and Stripe checkout. Built with Vue 3 and Node.js.

api.title: REST API Boilerplate
api.description: Production-ready Node.js API starter with JWT auth, Redis caching, rate limiting, and Docker Compose.

taskmanager.title: Task Manager App
taskmanager.description: Kanban-style task manager with real-time sync via Supabase, drag-and-drop, and team collaboration.

cli.title: CLI Dev Toolkit
cli.description: Command-line tool for automating common dev workflows — file scaffolding, git hooks, and project templates. Written in Rust.

designsystem.title: Design System
designsystem.description: Component library and design tokens built with Vue 3 and Storybook, published to NPM and documented with VitePress.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Thoughts and news from the web dev world.

error.page_not_found: Oops... this page got lost in the multiverse 👽
error.page_not_found_description: We looked everywhere. Even under the couch.
